title: How are you liking Rebuild so far ITT We tag Spoilers
display_title: How are you liking Rebuild so far ITT We tag Spoilers
wikitext:
[]: How are you liking Rebuild so far? (ITT We tag Spoilers)             Quote Post by The Goose » Wed Jul 01, 2009 9:23 pm After going through some of the threads, some people have voiced their displeasure of what Studio Khara have been doing with Evangelion. So, to avoid taking all those threads off-topic, I decided to start a new thread designed to talk about the forum member's likes/dislikes of the new films. I'll have to do mine later since I haven't seen the first film in awhile and also because I have to review some of the new plot elements revealed in 0.2.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Jul 01, 2009 9:32 pm I liked 1.0 just fine, nice visual update of the TV show 2.0, I'm going to have to wait and see because... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 01, 2009 9:36 pm I know some fans have been complaining about the changes to Asuka, but like Ornette said, if you don't mind changes from the series, you should like Rebuild. (Supposedly 2.0 is better then the series!) Based on what I heard about 2.0, I'm gonna like it. I felt 1.0 was a very good remake for the first 6 episodes of the series, too.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Wed Jul 01, 2009 9:52 pm This is milking a series in the best way. Not in a crappy way like Star Wars. I'll suck the nipple of Rebuild and smile all the way to the end.

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Wed Jul 01, 2009 10:06 pm 1.0 felt like a waste. It had some nice animation and soundtrack but overall it was pretty meh. 2.0 sounds very cool though overall I still am not gonna make any comparison till the whole thing is done. Right now on the track it's going it seems like an interested take on the franchise, though I don't feel it will live up to my love the of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Wed Jul 01, 2009 10:25 pm I loved the first Rebuild. Sure it was nothing new as far as story goes but I loved the original series and giving it a visual makeover made it even better,plus the Ramiel scene was 100 times better. As far as 2.0 goes, what I have heard about it sounds great,but I wont know if i like it or not until I actually see it.But I have faith in Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Wed Jul 01, 2009 10:41 pm I haven't watched 1.0 though I do have it on my computer. Untill I can find a subtitled version of 2.0, I wont watch it.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Wed Jul 01, 2009 10:57 pm IMHO, 1.0 was much prettier than the series, but otherwise it can't compare at all. I really loved many of the narrative tricks in the original that didn't make it into 1.0. Example 1: In the original, the Sachiel battle was shown as a flashback. This increased its impact x10. Example 2: In the original, after running away, Shinji finds Kensuke playing war and spends the night with him. Example 3: The original captures the relationship between Misato and Shinji so much better. etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Jul 01, 2009 11:08 pm I actually kind of like that he doesn't find Kensuke. It's just too contrived. Which is one of the reasons I like 1.0/2.0 a bit better than the original....

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Jul 01, 2009 11:10 pm So much analyzing the Rebuild... I liked 1.0, a lot ( ive watched it like 6 times) , and I cannot wait to see 2.0 and all the others. Also vv

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 01, 2009 11:14 pm Well... 1.0 - Great, stayed true to the store other then a few small changes. 2.0 - Wut

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Wed Jul 01, 2009 11:21 pm Action_Bastard wrote: REBUILD =/= SERIES! GET IT THROUGH YOUR THICK F***ING SKULLS!!

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jul 01, 2009 11:25 pm Overall I'm enjoying Rebuild very much. It doesn't have the character or emotional depth of NGE (how could it? that show was lighting in a bottle, something that won't happen twice) but it's great to see Anno approach his masterwork again and I've personally approached it as it's own work. I enjoyed 1.0 excessively and have watched it far too many times over the past 2 years and it's exciting to know 2.0 is going exactly where I wanted this series to go to from the beginning- Into new and uncharted territories. I already accepted that they weren't going to reach the heights of character depth with people like Asuka so changes like making her more moe are alright in my book. If NGE was about a group of people then Rebuild is about and only about Shinji IKARI. ...im drunk.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Jul 01, 2009 11:26 pm @Baz: His sig is ranting about 2.0 and reactions, not 1.0

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Jul 01, 2009 11:29 pm I love 1.0 and I still think the original series at the moment is still better. I can't wait for 2.0 and the other movies. I wounder what new ending that they will give us in the 4th one?

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Jul 02, 2009 12:27 am 1.0 is what I expected to be and it was great. I can't wait to see 2.0 because things will probably be more clear once things come together on screen.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jul 02, 2009 1:02 am 好きだよ＜３

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 02, 2009 1:31 am I liked 1.0 up to the conclusion of the Ramiel fight. I was uncertain at the point that it took the sudden left into the Pit of Voles. I hoped against hope that 2.0 might do a "with a mighty bound our hero is free", but with each trailer it became more apparent that it had gotten stuck there. And with what we have to date on 2.0 -- "Anno, I am disappoint."

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Jul 02, 2009 2:28 am Baz wrote: Example 2: In the original, after running away, Shinji finds Kensuke playing war and spends the night with him.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Thu Jul 02, 2009 3:16 am SaltyJoe wrote: "Too much Girlfriend of Steel."
